description: Reused walk.js shape from whooo (P-205 globToRegex fix already incorporated)
Applied P-403 (formatter-as-data) to FORMATTERS = { human, json } map

JSDoc block comment in walk.js self-terminated on the literal `** / X` (no spaces) sequence describing PAN's glob fix. SyntaxError: 'Unexpected identifier glob'. Caused by `*/` byte sequence ending the /** block early. Fix: switch to single-line // comments OR insert space `* / X` OR escape.
P-401 (sync I/O via fs.readFileSync) applied — used readFileSync(file) for both walk and content read
P-402 (trailing newline) enforced in both human and json formatters

Real dogfood revealed PAN's own corpus is large: commands/pan/ = 46K words, 8K lines, 322K chars across 52 files; docs/ = 289K words, 46K lines, 2M chars across 83 files. Performance budget (P-201 dogfood) handled it with no measurable lag.
Wrong-by-one chars assertion (24 vs my expected 25) caught by test. Reminder that text-byte-counting arithmetic is easy to get wrong; tests are the only reliable check.
